name: Scrounging Goblin
desc: If this card inflicts battle damage to your opponent: They can hand you 1 card from their hand to negate this effect, otherwise you add 1 "Goblin" card from your Deck to your hand, except "Goblin Fan".
mnst_eff: If this card inflicts battle damage to your opponent: They can hand you 1 card from their hand to negate this effect, otherwise you add 1 "Goblin" card from your Deck to your hand, except "Goblin Fan".
eff: If this card inflicts battle damage to your opponent: They can hand you 1 card from their hand to negate this effect, otherwise you add 1 "Goblin" card from your Deck to your hand, except "Goblin Fan".

action: Activates if battle damage is inflicted
Adds from your opponent's hand to your hand
